text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
A makeup artist I know told me about this
insanely bitter drink. It's pretty gross.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
But apparently, it does wonders for your skin, and
it acts fast, so I wanted to try a little.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I just have to put up with the taste. It's much
better than having to miss work because of skin
problems.

Gold City seems to be quite worried about the
condition of her skin.
